[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101100011 6
1 1110111010 7
2 0000011111 5
3 1111111111 a
4 0001111111 7
5 1111111101 9
6 1001111011 7
7 1101110101 7

70 07 1111111011 9
